headline: Citi Lifts PT on Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) to $274 From $250 – Here’s Why
summary: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) is one of the most profitable blue chip stocks to invest in now. On March 11, Citi lifted the price target on Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) to $274 from $250 while maintaining a Buy rating on the shares. The firm told investors in a research note that it adjusted price targets […]
